FAQ.TITLE: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.SUBTITLE: Quickly find answers to your questions

ITEMS.QUESTION: What regions do you serve?
ITEMS.ANSWER: We serve Saint-Jean-sur-Richelieu, Montréal and the South Shore. Contact us to verify if we cover your specific area.

ITEMS.QUESTION: Do you offer services for residences?
ITEMS.ANSWER: Yes! We offer our services to both commercial and residential clients. Whether you have a house, condo or apartment, we can help.

ITEMS.QUESTION: How do I get a quote?
ITEMS.ANSWER: Fill out our online contact form or call us directly. We will provide you with a free, no-obligation quote.

ITEMS.QUESTION: Are you equipped for high-rise buildings?
ITEMS.ANSWER: Absolutely. We have specialized equipment for high-rise window cleaning, whether for commercial buildings or multi-story residences.

ITEMS.QUESTION: What is the recommended frequency for window cleaning?
ITEMS.ANSWER: For businesses, we generally recommend monthly or quarterly cleaning depending on traffic. For residences, seasonal cleaning (2 to 4 times per year) is often sufficient.

ITEMS.QUESTION: What payment methods do you accept?
ITEMS.ANSWER: We accept payment by check, bank transfer and major credit cards. Payment terms are established during the quote process.

BANNER.TITLE: We use cookies
BANNER.DESCRIPTION: This site uses cookies to improve your experience. Necessary cookies are essential for the site to function. You can choose to accept or refuse optional cookies.

MODAL.TITLE: Cookie Preferences
MODAL.DESCRIPTION: Manage your cookie preferences. In accordance with Quebec's Law 25, we respect your privacy and give you control over your data.

NECESSARY.TITLE: Necessary Cookies
NECESSARY.DESCRIPTION: These cookies are essential for the site to function and cannot be disabled. They enable navigation and use of basic features.

ANALYTICS.TITLE: Analytics Cookies
ANALYTICS.DESCRIPTION: These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with our site by collecting information anonymously.

MARKETING.TITLE: Marketing Cookies
MARKETING.DESCRIPTION: These cookies are used to track visitors across websites to display relevant advertisements.

INTRO.TITLE: Introduction
INTRO.CONTENT: Brio-Net is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use and protect your personal information, in accordance with Quebec's Law 25 on the protection of personal information.

COLLECTION.TITLE: Information Collection
COLLECTION.CONTENT: We collect information you voluntarily provide through our contact form: name, email, phone (optional), desired service, region and message.

USE.TITLE: Use of Information
USE.CONTENT: Your information is used only to respond to your quote requests and to communicate with you about our services.

COOKIES.TITLE: Cookies and Similar Technologies
COOKIES.CONTENT: Our site uses cookies necessary for the site to function. Analytics and marketing cookies are only activated with your explicit consent.

RIGHTS.TITLE: Your Rights
RIGHTS.CONTENT: You have the right to access your data, correct it or request its deletion. Contact us to exercise these rights.

CONTACT.TITLE: Contact
CONTACT.CONTENT: For any questions about this policy, contact us via our form or by phone.
